---
title: "DataBank"
---

## Overview

`dl::DataBank` provides a DataManager-independent named store for geometry
sources and channel-encoded tensors. It holds pre-encoded static (memory) model
inputs that can be reused across inference runs without re-fetching from
DataManager on every forward pass.

Encoded tensors use libtorch (`at::Tensor`); geometry sources use
`EncodingSourceVariant` from `EncoderDispatch`.

**Location:** `src/DeepLearning/storage/`

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `DataBankEntry.hpp` | `DataBankEntry`, `DataBankEntryMetadata` |
| `DataBank.hpp` / `DataBank.cpp` | Named entry library |
| `DataBankEncode.hpp` / `DataBankEncode.cpp` | Standalone encoding helpers |

## Types

### `DataBankEntryMetadata`

Provenance recorded at capture time:

| Field | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `label` | Optional UI display name |
| `data_key` | DataManager key the source was captured from |
| `captured_frame` | Frame index in that object's timebase (`-1` if unknown) |
| `source_image_size` | Original image dimensions for geometry scaling |
| `encoder_factory_name` | Encoder used when encoding (e.g. `"Mask2DEncoder"`) |

### `DataBankEntry`

| Member | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `source` | Optional raw `EncodingSourceVariant` (mask, point, line, image) |
| `encoded` | Optional channel-encoded tensor with **batch dimension = 1** |
| `metadata` | Provenance fields above |

### `DataBank`

Keyed library of entries. Default capacity: `kDefaultMaxEntries` (64). New
`put*` operations fail when the limit is reached (unless overwriting an
existing ID).

## Entry ID validation

`validateEntryId(id)` rejects:

- Empty strings
- Whitespace-only strings
- Any internal whitespace
- `:` (reserved for legacy slot-bound cache keys)

Returns `std::optional<std::string>` — engaged value is an error message.

## API

| Method | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `contains(id)` | Whether an entry exists |
| `get(id)` | Copy of full entry |
| `getEncoded(id)` / `getSource(id)` | Lookup helpers |
| `putSource(id, source, metadata)` | Store raw geometry/image only |
| `putEncoded(id, tensor, metadata, source?)` | Store encoded tensor; optional source retained |
| `encodeEntry(id, slot, encoder_params)` | Encode stored source in place via `EncoderDispatch` |
| `remove(id)` / `clear()` | Delete one or all entries |
| `ids()` / `size()` / `maxEntries()` | Inventory |
| `encodedShape(id)` / `encodedRange(id)` | UI preview helpers |

`putEncoded` requires the tensor to be defined with leading batch size 1.

## Encoding helpers (`DataBankEncode.hpp`)

Free functions usable without storing in a bank:

| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `perElementShape(slot)` | Shape of one sequence element (requires `sequence_dim >= 0`) |
| `encodingShapeForSlot(slot)` | Shape passed to encoders (strips sequence axis when present) |
| `makeEncoderContext(slot, batch_index)` | Build `EncoderContext` from encoding shape |
| `encodeSourceToTensor(source, slot, encoder, source_image_size)` | Allocate `{1, ...}` tensor and encode |

## Provenance

`metadata.data_key` and `metadata.captured_frame` record where an entry was
captured. Widget code can use these to re-fetch the same DataManager object
when refreshing UI, even though the bank itself does not depend on
DataManager at read time.

## Session binding

Static memory positions choose a **source** via `StaticInputSourceVariant`
(see [Memory frame bindings](bindings/memory_frames.qmd)):

| Source | Binding fields | Assembly behaviour |
|--------|----------------|-------------------|
| `DataManager` | `data_key`, `time_offset` | Re-encode from DataManager each run |
| `DataBank` | `bank_entry_id` (or default `{slot_name}_{memory_index}`) | Copy `DataBank::getEncoded()` into the input tensor |

Helpers in `DeepLearningBindingData.hpp`:

- `defaultBankEntryId(slot_name, memory_index)`
- `resolvedBankEntryId(binding)` — explicit ID or default when in DataBank mode
- `hasActiveStaticSource(binding)` — DataBank mode needs a resolved entry ID;
  DataManager mode needs a non-empty `data_key`

`SlotAssembler` owns a session-scoped `dl::DataBank` via `dataBank()`.
`resetModel()` does **not** clear it; call `clearDataBank()` explicitly.

## SlotAssembler integration

### Capture

| Method | Role |
|--------|------|
| `captureToBank(dm, bank_entry_id, entry, frame, source_image_size)` | Fetch from DataManager using `staticDataKey(entry)`, `putSource()`, then `encodeEntry()` with the slot's `recommended_encoder` |
| `captureStaticInput(dm, entry, frame, source_image_size)` | Same as `captureToBank()` using `resolvedBankEntryId(entry)` as the bank key |

`captureToBank()` requirements:

- Model loaded (`isModelReady()`)
- `bank_entry_id` passes `validateEntryId()`
- `staticDataKey(entry)` non-empty
- Target slot exists, `is_static == true`
- Slot `recommended_encoder` resolves via `EncoderFactory`

Properties-panel capture (`DataBankPropertiesWidget`) calls `captureToBank()`
with a user-selected DataManager source and the resolved entry ID for the
chosen static slot / memory index.

### Assembly

`assembleInputs()` fills static slots from memory-frame bindings:

- **DataBank** — `getBankCachedTensor()` copies `getEncoded()` and expands
  batch dimension when `batch_size > 1`. Missing encoded data logs an error and
  leaves zeros.
- **DataManager** — re-encodes at `current_frame + time_offset` each run.

At inference time, DataBank bindings use the **cached encoded tensor**, not
a live re-encode from `getSource()` (source is retained for capture,
`encodeEntry()`, and potential future refresh paths).

### Recurrent `StaticCapture` init

At t=0, `runRecurrentSequence()` seeds recurrent cache by:

1. Matching static `MemoryFrameBinding` at the same slot/index with DataBank
   source → `getBankCachedTensor()`
2. Else `getEncoded(defaultBankEntryId(slot, index))`
3. Else capture from `StaticCaptureInit` `data_key` / `frame` into the default
   bank entry via `captureStaticInput()`
4. Else fall back to zeros

## UI

Widget triplets under `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/DataBank/`:

| Widget | Zone | Role |
|--------|------|------|
| `DataBankPropertiesWidget` | Properties | Capture: target slot, memory index, DataManager source, capture button — [details](../../ui/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/DataBank/DataBankPropertiesWidget.qmd) |
| `DataBankViewWidget` | View | Preview cards (shape, value range, provenance) — [details](../../ui/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/DataBank/DataBankViewWidget.qmd) |

`DeepLearningPropertiesWidget` embeds the properties widget above the dynamic
slot area and refreshes bank-entry combo boxes from `dataBank().ids()`.
`DeepLearningViewWidget` embeds the view widget and calls
`refreshDataBankView()` on bank changes.

Static memory slot widgets (`MemorySlotWidget`) configure DataManager vs
DataBank bindings only; capture is centralized in `DataBankPropertiesWidget`.

## Tests

`tests/DeepLearning/storage/DataBank.test.cpp` — tagged `[storage][DataBank]`.

## See also

- [Memory frame bindings](bindings/memory_frames.qmd) — `MemoryFrameBinding`, DataBank vs DataManager sources
- [Encoder dispatch](channel_encoding/EncoderDispatch.qmd) — `EncodingSourceVariant`, `encodeToTensor`
